task_completion.description: Set the Dependent Variable to 'Exam' in Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Linear Regression analysis interface, the variable 'Exam' is visible in the 'Dependent Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Set 'Anxiety' as the covariate in the first block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Model Builder or Covariates section, 'Anxiety' is listed under Block 1.

task_completion.description: Set 'Revise' as the covariate in the second block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Model Builder, a second block (Block 2) is visible and the variable 'Revise' is assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Save the Jamovi project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window title displays 'HierarchicalRegression.omv', or a file manager/save dialog shows the file saved in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/.
A text editor is open with the filename 'hierarchical_regression_report.txt' visible in the title bar or save dialog, located in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/.

task_completion.description: Include all required values rounded to 4 decimal places in the text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the labels Model1_R2, Model2_R2, R2_Change, R2_Change_Significant (yes/no), Revise_B, and Anxiety_B_Model2, each accompanied by a numerical value (or yes/no) with the numbers formatted to exactly 4 decimal places.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi graphical interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jamovi application open with the dataset loaded and regression results in the output panel, rather than terminal commands executing a script.

integrity.description: The agent extracted values from the actual Jamovi output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into the text report correspond to the results visible in the Jamovi output panel in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or used a standard text editor to create the report, rather than using a terminal command to echo placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or mousepad) is visible on screen being used to write the report.
